calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-09-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Aug-04-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Christine Marcelli, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Chase Bank USA, N.A., a corporation.
Cheri Gorman, Litigation Specialist for plaintif, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Victor Pon.
Default entered against defendant on March 11, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on March 11, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Chase Bank USA, N.A., a corporation, and against the Defaulted Defendant Victor Pon as follows:

Damages/Principal - $54,603.50.
Prejudgment Interest - $4,607.64.
Attorney's Fees - $0.00.
Costs - $393.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $59,604.14.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
